description: Deploys the SecurityInsight Risk Analysis management dashboard into the customer's Power BI tenant via REST API. Creates/updates the workspace, uploads the .pbix, rebinds parameters (LA workspace / tenant / StalenessDays / TopNFindings), optionally grants an AAD group access, and queues an initial dataset refresh. One-time per customer + re-run whenever you rev the .pbix design.
author: Morten Knudsen <mok@mortenknudsen.net>
notes: The Step 4 engine handles its own Power BI OAuth (token endpoint + REST API). Launcher just loads LauncherConfig.custom.ps1 and splats globals to engine params. No Az.Accounts / Connect-AzAccount required.
